query: what is covered for sleep apnea?
answer:
Here are the covered medications for **sleep apnea, obstructive** on your formulary:

## Drug Coverage

| Drug | Tier | Status | Requirements |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| ANORO ELLIPTA INHALATION BLISTER WITH DEVICE 62.5-25 MCG/ACTUATION | Preferred Brand | Covered | — |
| modafinil oral tablet 100 mg, 200 mg | Preferred Generic | Covered | — |
| TRELEGY ELLIPTA INHALATION BLISTER WITH DEVICE 100-62.5-25 MCG, 200-62.5-25 MCG | Preferred Brand | Covered | — |

_Find your drug's tier in the Drug Coverage table above, then locate that tier below to see what you'll pay._

## Your Cost

| Drug Tier | In-Network | Out-of-Network |
| :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Tier 1 — Preferred Generic drugs | $25 copay | Not covered |
| Tier 1 — Preferred Generic drugs | $50 copay | Not covered |
| Tier 2 — Preferred Brand drugs | $45 copay | Not covered |
| Tier 2 — Preferred Brand drugs | $90 copay | Not covered |


> **Not covered under your plan:** PROVIGIL
